codes.description: JSON artifact payload is missing, malformed, or not an object.
codes.title: JSON_OBJECT_REQUIRED

codes.description: Artifact schema does not match required schema.
codes.title: SCHEMA_MISMATCH

codes.description: Artifact payload violates frozen grammar or required field contracts.
codes.title: ARTIFACT_INVALID

codes.description: Canonical hash recomputation mismatches recorded hash fields.
codes.title: CROSS_ARTIFACT_HASH_MISMATCH

codes.description: Deployment mode selection/source policy contract violated.
codes.title: DEPLOYMENT_MODE_POLICY_VIOLATION

codes.description: Mode contract identity or policy-equivalence constraints were violated.
codes.title: MODE_CONTRACT_IDENTITY_MISMATCH

codes.description: Packaging manifest payload or bundle-hash subject is invalid or drifted.
codes.title: PACKAGING_MANIFEST_INVALID

codes.description: Packaging diagnostic registry contract is missing or invalid.
codes.title: CONTRACT_REGISTRY_INVALID

codes.description: Packaging rejection diagnostic payload violates frozen ordering/type rules.
codes.title: PACKAGING_REJECTION_DIAGNOSTIC_INVALID

codes.description: Packaging provenance artifact is missing, malformed, or hash-invalid.
codes.title: PACKAGING_PROVENANCE_INVALID

codes.description: Subprocess deployment-mode propagation or env-override policy violated.
codes.title: SUBPROCESS_MODE_POLICY_VIOLATION

codes.description: Canonical-subject or emitted-file path normalization drift detected.
codes.title: CANONICAL_SUBJECT_PATH_NORMALIZATION_DRIFT

codes.description: Packaging failed without required rejection diagnostic emission.
codes.title: PACKAGING_FAILURE_WITHOUT_REJECTION_DIAGNOSTIC
